query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM agendamentos WHERE empresaId = 1;
SELECT id, clienteId, data, horaInicio, status, profissionalId FROM agendamentos WHERE empresaId = 1 ORDER BY data DESC LIMIT 10;
